name: Layered Tex-Mex Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) black beans, rinsed and drained, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream, cumin, chili powder, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
2. With a fork, mash half of the black beans. Stir with the remaining black beans and 2 tablespoons of the sour cream mixture.
3. Mash the avocados with lemon juice.
4. In a large glass bowl, layer:
- Half of the bean mixture
- All of the avocado mixture
- Half of the remaining sour cream mixture
- Lettuce
- Remaining bean mixture
- Cheese
- Tomatoes
- Remaining sour cream mixture
5. Top with black olives.
6. Serve at room temperature with chips.
